response.global_analysis: The audio phonetically matches the Reference JSON for the first verse. The Reference JSON is incomplete, covering only the beginning of the song. I am transcribing the remainder of the song and the ending dialogue directly from the audio and on-screen context. I have verified that the timing is strictly aligned with the vocal audio and includes the dialogue after the music ends.
